description: §18.8.1 / §53.15 — a match over a MEMBER-ACCESS subject whose declared field type is an enum-subset refinement (role: Role oneOf([.Admin, .Editor])). A .Viewer arm names a variant the subset excludes, so it is a dead arm — E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM. Regression guard: because resolveMatchSubjectType did not resolve member expressions, the subset refinement carried on the struct field was never consulted and the dead arm compiled clean.
rationale: §18.8.1 SF-1: a concrete dead variant arm (a .Viewer arm over a oneOf([.Admin,.Editor])-typed value) names an IMPOSSIBLE case and SHALL be E-MATCH-SUBSET-DEAD-ARM. A member-access subject resolves to the field's declared subset-refined type, so the subset variant set drives the dead-arm check exactly as for a bound-local subject.
